products.description: Ergonomic racing-style gaming chair with adjustable armrests and lumbar support. Designed for long gaming sessions with premium PU leather and high-density foam cushioning.
SHARP Leatherette Gaming Chair – Blue. Premium stitching, adjustable height, and 360-degree swivel for maximum comfort during work and play.

products.productName: Bossin Gaming Chair with Footrest and Massage
products.description: A comfortable gaming chair with footrest and massage feature, available in multiple colors. Built-in lumbar massage, retractable footrest, and padded armrests for ultimate relaxation.
Bestseller Chair in the USA. International Quality checks. Sold in 15 countries worldwide. Ergonomic design with adjustable lumbar support and headrest pillow.
Professional ergonomic office chair with mesh back, adjustable armrests, and breathable cushion. Perfect for home office or corporate use.
Premium wireless Bluetooth headphones with noise isolation, 20-hour battery life, and comfortable over-ear design for immersive audio.
Adjustable LED desk lamp with touch control, 5 brightness levels, USB charging port, and flexible gooseneck for targeted lighting.
RGB mechanical gaming keyboard with blue switches, programmable keys, and aluminum frame. Built for speed and precision.
Compact portable Bluetooth speaker with deep bass, 12-hour playtime, IPX5 waterproof rating, and built-in microphone for calls.
Vertical wireless ergonomic mouse with adjustable DPI, silent clicks, and comfortable grip. Reduces wrist strain during long work sessions.
